title: Connect workorders as an internal source adapter
requirements: Expose workorders as source_code workorders or workorders_system_of_record.
Use source_origin internal and privacy profile default pii_off unless overridden.
Render number, title, description, department, priority, status, device, comments, transitions, closure and rating into search text.
Use access_policy mode adapter_check with the existing visible_workorders_queryset policy.
Extract analytics facts for create, transition, close, rating and repeated device/problem signals where feasible.
Do not make apps.memory import WorkOrder or call workorders selectors directly outside adapter_check abstraction.
Prepare workorders.search wrapper if needed for AI agent ergonomics.
acceptance_checks: python manage.py test apps.workorders.tests apps.memory.tests apps.analytics.tests apps.ai.tests
